# Monsieur Click

> Local SEO agency and web design for small businesses (EN). Twin FR: [monsieurclick.fr](https://monsieurclick.fr/).
> RSL 1.0 — Responsible Site License for AI engines and authorized indexing robots.

## Entity
- Name: Monsieur Click
- Proprietary method: Click First™
- Address: 24 bis sentier des Fosses Rouges, 92240 Malakoff, France
- Phone: +33 6 60 76 15 23
- Email: contact@monsieurclick.com
- Areas: United States, United Kingdom, Canada, France, Belgium, Switzerland
- Languages: English (EN), French (FR)
- SIRET: 42953906700042
- Promise: Be found. Be chosen.
- [Site EN](https://monsieurclick.com/)
- [Site FR](https://monsieurclick.fr/)
- [OKF bundle EN](https://monsieurclick.com/okf/)
- [OKF bundle FR](https://monsieurclick.fr/okf/)
- [Texts bundle EN](https://monsieurclick.com/texts/)
- [Texts bundle FR](https://monsieurclick.fr/texts/)

## Main pages
- [Home](https://monsieurclick.com/): Local SEO agency and web design for small businesses
- [Click First™](https://monsieurclick.com/click-first/): All-in-one visibility system — website, local SEO, GBP, reviews, GEO
- [Services hub](https://monsieurclick.com/services/): SEO and web deliverables
- [Web design](https://monsieurclick.com/services/web-design/): Fast, conversion-focused websites
- [SEO services](https://monsieurclick.com/services/seo/): Technical and on-page SEO for SMBs
- [Local SEO](https://monsieurclick.com/services/local-seo/): Google Maps and local pack visibility
- [Google Business Profile](https://monsieurclick.com/services/google-business-profile/): GBP optimization for local calls
- [SEO audit](https://monsieurclick.com/services/seo-audit/): Technical, on-page and competitive audit
- [WordPress web design](https://monsieurclick.com/services/wordpress-web-design/): WordPress sites built for SEO
- [Generative Engine Optimization](https://monsieurclick.com/services/generative-engine-optimization/): AI visibility (GEO)
- [Website redesign](https://monsieurclick.com/services/website-redesign/): Faster, clearer, better converting sites
- [Small business SEO](https://monsieurclick.com/small-business-seo/): SEO for trades and local SMBs
- [AI SEO agency](https://monsieurclick.com/ai-seo-agency/): SEO plus AI discoverability
- [SEO agency London](https://monsieurclick.com/seo-agency-london/): Remote SEO for UK businesses
- [Pricing](https://monsieurclick.com/pricing/): Essential €850/mo, Growth €1,000/mo, Expansion €1,500/mo
- [Case studies](https://monsieurclick.com/case-studies/): Assogym, Dharma Massage, Susan Filan, Bodyguard Paris, Heather Fillmore, Studio La Voix du 12, East Portland Sash
- [About](https://monsieurclick.com/about/): Founder Jean-Pierre Baguette, 100% remote
- [Free diagnostic](https://monsieurclick.com/contact/): 30-minute call, no commitment
- [Blog](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/): 18 articles on local SEO, GBP and AI visibility

## Blog — Strategy
- [Click First™ not just SEO](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/click-first-not-just-seo/): Why isolated SEO tools fail without a system
- [Become a reference business](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/become-a-reference-business/): Visibility vs trust and authority
- [Is a website enough in 2026?](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/is-a-website-enough-2026/): What SMBs still need beyond a site
- [Google Ads vs SEO](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/google-ads-vs-seo/): Paid vs organic for local businesses
- [SEO agency pricing 2026](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/seo-agency-pricing-2026/): What to expect and compare
- [What is an SEO agency?](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/what-is-an-seo-agency/): Scope, deliverables and red flags
- [How to choose an SEO agency](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/how-to-choose-an-seo-agency/): Practical selection criteria

## Blog — Local SEO and GBP
- [Why competitors rank ahead](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/why-competitors-rank-ahead/): Local ranking gaps explained
- [Why business not on Google](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/why-business-not-on-google/): Common visibility blockers
- [How Google ranks businesses](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/how-google-ranks-businesses/): Proximity, relevance, prominence
- [GBP with no calls](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/google-business-profile-no-calls/): Fix a silent Google profile
- [Get more Google reviews](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/get-more-google-reviews/): Ethical review acquisition

## Blog — AI visibility (GEO)
- [GEO for businesses](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/geo-generative-engine-optimization/): Generative Engine Optimization primer
- [Appear in ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/appear-in-chatgpt-gemini-perplexity/): Practical GEO checklist
- [Clients ask ChatGPT before Google](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/clients-ask-chatgpt-before-google/): Changing buyer journeys
- [Will AI replace Google?](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/will-ai-replace-google/): SEO vs AI search in 2026

## Blog — Acquisition
- [Website losing clients](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/is-your-website-losing-clients/): Conversion and trust signals
- [Clients without advertising](https://monsieurclick.com/blog/get-clients-without-advertising/): Organic demand for local SMBs

## Pricing
| Plan | Fit | Price | Commitment |
|------|-----|-------|------------|
| Click First™ Essential | Small site / coach | €850/mo | 6 months |
| Click First™ Growth | Trades / local SME | €1,000/mo | 12 months |
| Click First™ Expansion | Multi-location | €1,500/mo | 12 months |

## Verified outcomes
- Dub-School: +40% students
- Heather Fillmore Coaching: +200% traffic
- Sync Legal: +150% leads
